summary: 理性医学的奠基人，以四体液理论为根基，将医学从宗教迷信中解放出来，强调预防为主、整体诊疗、观察与经验并重，并以誓言建立医患伦理的永恒标准。

core_beliefs.belief: 医学是一门独立于宗教和哲学的技艺（techne）

evidence.quote: Hippocrates was the first physician in history to establish medicine as a science.
Hippocrates was the first to separate medicine from philosophy.
evidence.source: Cornelius Celsus, as cited in World History Encyclopedia

evidence.quote: Moving the subject of medicine away from the previously supernatural and religious approach, which had been closely linked to the Greek god of healing Asclepius, towards a modern approach of observation, classification, causes and effects.

core_beliefs.belief: 四体液理论：健康源于血液、粘液、黄胆汁、黑胆汁的平衡

evidence.quote: The human body also consisted of four fluids or 'humors' - black bile, yellow bile, phlegm, and blood - as well as four elemental conditions (hot, cold, dry, and moist). Health was associated, according to the great physician, with a balance of all these elements.
The ancient Greeks believed that all maladies started from the gut.

core_beliefs.belief: 预防优于治疗：饮食、运动与生活方式是健康的核心

evidence.quote: Κάλλιον το προλαμβάνειν του θεραπεύειν (It is better to prevent than to treat a disease).
Walking was the best available medicine.
Healthy Mediterranean diet and daily moderate physical activity can prevent disease.

core_beliefs.belief: 整体医学：人体是身、心、神的统一体，任何部分失衡都会影响整体

evidence.quote: Hippocrates considered that patients consisted of body, mind, and spirit and this is also the modern physicians' approach when treating a disease.
The human body is a sum of many parts that co-exist in a harmonic balance.

The holistic approach is based on the assumption that the human body is a sum of many parts that function in harmony and that if one part is ill, the balance will be affected and the whole person will suffer.

core_beliefs.belief: 疾病的自然原因论：癫痫不是神圣惩罚，而是脑部疾病

evidence.quote: The treatise on the sacred disease contributed greatly to diminishing any theories of the divine origin of the disease and categorizing it as a relatively common brain disorder.
Hippocrates considered the accumulation of black bile and mucus in the veins of the brain to be the cause of epilepsy.

core_beliefs.belief: 临床观察与预后：详细观察症状，做出预判是医师的核心技能

evidence.quote: The most important value that a physician should follow, according to Hippocrates, is a meticulous clinical examination, which includes careful observation of the patient and detailed history taking of his symptoms and signs.
Diagnosis and prognosis are frequent subjects [of the Epidemics].

philosophical_orientation.school: 古典希腊自然主义医学
philosophical_orientation.opposition_to: 宗教/神圣疾病解释、庙宇求医
philosophical_orientation.position: 理性经验主义 — 以观察自然现象为基础，强调经验与推理结合

principles: 不施害：不给毒药、不协助堕胎、不用手术刀（结石病除外交由专科）
保护隐私：患者之事不言于外
尊重师长：视师如父，无偿教授其子
专业边界：不越权行事，只做受训范围内的诊疗

notes: 希波克拉底本人是否亲自撰写《誓言》仍有争议；但他确立了医学伦理的核心原则。这些原则通过《誓言》流传至今，仍是现代医学伦理的基础。
